Notice: A category can only be deleted i: Notice: A category can only be deleted if it has no dependencies. This means it can be removed if it is not linked to any subcategories, jobs, projects, or skills.
Notice: A freeze on chat means that clie: Notice: A freeze on chat means that clients are unable to send chat message.
Notice: A freeze on chat means that free: Notice: A freeze on chat means that freelancers are unable to send chat message.
Notice: A freeze on jobs create edit mea: Notice: A freeze on jobs create edit means that clients are unable to create and edit his job.
Notice: A freeze on order means that cli: Notice: A freeze on order means that clients are unable to create new orders.
Notice: A freeze on projects create edit: Notice: A freeze on projects create edit means that freelancers are unable to create and edit his project.
Notice: A freeze on withdrawals means th: Notice: A freeze on withdrawals means that freelancers are unable to submit requests to withdraw amount.
Notice: A manual payment subscription ca: Notice: A manual payment subscription can be used only when the payment status is complete and the status remains active.
Notice: A skill can be deleted if it has: Notice: A skill can be deleted if it has no dependencies. It can be removed if it is not linked to any jobs.
Notice: A subcategory can be deleted onl: Notice: A subcategory can be deleted only if it has no dependencies. It can be removed if it is not associated with any jobs, projects, or skills.
Notice: A subscription can be deleted if: Notice: A subscription can be deleted if it has no dependencies. Specifically, it can be removed only if it is not associated with any user.
Notice: A suspended user will be unable: Notice: A suspended user will be unable to place new order.
Notice: A suspended user will be unable to receive new orders or place bids on any jobs.
Notice: A type can only be deleted if it: Notice: A type can only be deleted if it has no dependencies. If a type is not associated with any subscriptions, you can proceed to delete it.
Notice: According reports admin will tak: Notice: According reports admin will take action over user.
Notice: Active means the campaign will s: Notice: Active means the campaign will show for the website users.
Notice: Active means users will be able: Notice: Active means users will be able to see the project on the website.
Notice: Admin can search by ticket id, t: Notice: Admin can search by ticket id, ticket status, ticket priority.
Notice: After restoring your work hours,: Notice: After restoring your work hours, you must submit your work to avoid losing the previous hours. Once submitted, restart the timer.
Notice: After submit order client will r: Notice: After submit order client will review it. Here he will approved it or ask for further modification according to order revisions. Order amount will automatically add your account once the client approved the oreder.
Notice: All admins created by super admi: Notice: All admins created by super admin.
Notice: Auto approval settings means the: Notice: Auto approval settings means the order will complete automatically if client don't do any action within the setup days
Notice: Before create an order we encour: Notice: Before create an order we encourage to contact the influencer so that the influencer can not decline your order.
Notice: Campaign Auto Approval Settings: Notice: Campaign Auto Approval Settings refer to the automatic publication of a campaign as soon as a client posts it.
Notice: Client review your submitted wor: Notice: Client review your submitted work and ask for revision. See the bellow description for required changes..
Notice: Commission Settings means how mu: Notice: Commission Settings means how much percentage will admin get per completed order. Generally admin will get 25 percent each order if he/she don't set any commission.
Notice: Connect Settings refers to the n: Notice: Connect Settings refers to the number of connects deducted for each bid or job proposal. By default, one connect is automatically reduced unless connect is specified.
Notice: Days refers to the number of day: Notice: Days refers to the number of days a freelancer profile will be displayed in the talent page promotional area after he buy a package.
Notice: Days refers to the number of days a freelancer project will be displayed in the project promotional area after he buy a package.
Notice: Days refers to the number of days a freelancer project will be displayed in the promotional area after he buy a package.
Notice: Department status inactive means: Notice: Department status inactive means the department will not show while create a ticket.
Notice: Deposit amount settings refer to: Notice: Deposit amount settings refer to the maximum amount a user can deposit into their wallet at one time. For instance, setting it to 500 means a user can deposit up to a maximum of 500 in each transaction.
Notice: Except state and city all fields: Notice: Except state and city all fields are required. Your identity verify documents info must be similar your personal info.
Notice: For example, if you set the maxi: Notice: For example, if you set the maximum withdrawal amount to 100, a user will not be able to withdraw more than 100 in each request.
Notice: However, you have the option to: Notice: However, you have the option to disable the auto approval system. If you choose to do so, you will need to manually activate the campaign to make it visible to the public.
Notice: However, you have the option to disable the auto approval system. If you choose to do so, you will need to manually activate the project to make it visible to the public.
Notice: Identity verify means user verif: Notice: Identity verify means user verified his identity by legal documents
Notice: If a completed order is canceled: Notice: If a completed order is canceled by the admin, the order amount will be credited to the client wallet and deducted from the influencer wallet.
Notice: If an order is in the queue and: Notice: If an order is in the queue and funded, an admin has the authority to decline it. If an admin decline a queued order, the order amount will be credited back to the client wallet.
Notice: If pay by milestone you can skip: Notice: If pay by milestone you can skip description section
Notice: If PayPal does not support your: Notice: If PayPal does not support your currency, it will convert the value of your currency to USD based on the current exchange rate of your currency.
Notice: If you didn't want to create ord: Notice: If you didn't want to create order if payment process failed keep this disable
Notice: If you do not set any option by: Notice: If you do not set any option by default campaign will publish automatically.
Notice: If you do not set any option by default each project need to activate manually.
Notice: If you do not set any option by default order will complete automatically after 30 days.

Notice: If you don't want to create mile: Notice: If you don't want to create milestone while create an order keep this disable
Notice: If you select inactive status th: Notice: If you select inactive status the department will not show while create a ticket.
Notice: If you want to disable bottom to: Notice: If you want to disable bottom to top button keep this disable.
Notice: If you want to disable campaigns: Notice: If you want to disable campaigns keep this disable.
Notice: If you want to disable client wi: Notice: If you want to disable client withdraw keep this disable.
Notice: If you want to disable custom po: Notice: If you want to disable custom pointer keep this disable.
Notice: If you want to disable display c: Notice: If you want to disable display commission amount, pending balance, earned balanced from client panel inside order details keep this disable.
Notice: If you want to disable home page: Notice: If you want to disable home page animation keep this disable.
Notice: If you want to disable jobs keep: Notice: If you want to disable jobs keep this disable.
Notice: If you want to disable page load: Notice: If you want to disable page loader keep this disable.

Notice: Inactive means the campaign will: Notice: Inactive means the campaign will not show for the website users.
Notice: Inactive means the project will: Notice: Inactive means the project will be hidden from users.
Notice: Individual commission settings a: Notice: Individual commission settings allow the admin to assign a unique commission rate for each specific user.
Notice: Individual Commission Settings m: Notice: Individual Commission Settings means how much percentage will admin get per completed order for the selected user. Generally admin will get 25 percent each order if he/she don't set any global/individual commission.
Notice: Invoices are available only for: Notice: Invoices are available only for complete order.
Notice: Order type refers to whether the: Notice: Order type refers to whether the order was generated from a project or a job.
Notice: Permanently deleting a user resu: Notice: Permanently deleting a user results in the irreversible removal of all their associated information from the system, making these data non-recoverable.
Notice: Please discuss project requireme: Notice: Please discuss project requirements and budget with the client before sending an offer to prevent misunderstandings.
Notice: Please login as a freelancer to: Notice: Please login as a freelancer to buy a subscription.
Notice: Please login as a influencer to: Notice: Please login as a influencer to buy a subscription.
Notice: Please wait. we will notify by e: Notice: Please wait. we will notify by email whether you verified or not. Multiple request may delay your verification.
Notice: Project Auto Approval Settings r: Notice: Project Auto Approval Settings refer to the automatic publication of a project as soon as a freelancer posts it.
Notice: Rejected means the project has i: Notice: Rejected means the project has issues and the user is requested to resolve these issues and resubmit the project.
Notice: Remember you will not able to lo: Notice: Remember you will not able to login this account after delete your account.

Notice: The admin has the ability to cre: Notice: The admin has the ability to create tickets for both the client and the freelancer if desired.
Notice: The admin has the ability to upd: Notice: The admin has the ability to update the payment status for transactions that are pending.
Notice: This is a collection of influenc: Notice: This is a collection of influencer feedbacks. You can edit feedbacks here. Only approved feedbacks will be displayed on the frontend.
Notice: To activate live chat you must s: Notice: To activate live chat you must setup your pusher credentials.
Notice: To activate push notifications f: Notice: To activate push notifications for mobile app you must upload your firebase json file.
Notice: To keep the category section dis: Notice: To keep the category section disabled on the frontend, make sure this remains disabled.
Notice: Transaction fee means how much c: Notice: Transaction fee means how much charge will user pay for each transaction. Generally no charge will be added if you set transaction charge 0.

Notice: When a new user register as a in: Notice: When a new user register as a influencer by default he/she will get the welcome subscription. Once it is complete or expired he must buy subscription for sending campaign proposal or bid.
Notice: When an admin deactivates a user: Notice: When an admin deactivates a user account, the user will no longer receive new orders. Additionally, projects and jobs associated with both freelancers and clients will be hidden from public view until the account is reactivated.
Notice: Withdraw amount settings allow y: Notice: Withdraw amount settings allow you to define the minimum and maximum amounts that can be withdrawn. For example, if the minimum is set to 50, a user can only make a withdrawal request if their balance is equal to or exceeds 50.
Notice: Withdraw fee means how much amou: Notice: Withdraw fee means how much amount will user pay for each withdraw. Generally no fee will be applicable if you set withdraw fee 0.
